intent_groups.title: Git pre-commit/post-commit hooks for intent manifest enforcement
intent_groups.task_grounding: The forcing function that rejects commits without intent manifests. Pre-commit validates staged.json exists and has valid structure; post-commit renames to <sha>.json and amends.

annotations.body: Post-commit amends the commit to include the finalized manifest, which changes the SHA. The manifest's commit_sha and filename reflect the pre-amend SHA. This is acceptable — the assembler keys on file contents, not SHA matching.

Pre-commit hook uses python3 for JSON validation rather than jq or node. Python3 is more universally available on dev machines. Alternative: shell-only validation (fragile) or node (heavier dependency for a git hook).

intent_groups.title: CLI install, uninstall, and assemble commands
intent_groups.task_grounding: Standardized install step via `acb-review install` and assembly via `acb-review assemble` as requested. Install supports --link (core.hooksPath) and --copy modes.
